Each valid run should contain:

```text
best.pt
last.pt
training_history.json
fresh_eval.json
drift_eval.json
```

Current locked result:

| Config | Source best | Fresh eval | Drift 24h |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| 4-bit PCM | 76.71 ± 0.46% | 76.6845 ± 0.37% | 72.64 ± 0.71% |
| 8-bit PCM | 77.64 ± 0.68% | 77.5955 ± 0.64% | 77.57 ± 0.61% |

Remote raw data transfer note:

- The remote servers do not push to GitHub.
- Returned remote results are currently preserved as reviewed Markdown/broadcasts in `report_md/_gpt`, not as raw checkpoint files.
- If remote sends chunked Markdown later, reconstruct it under `report_md/_gpt/remote_returns/` or `outputs/remote_returns/` to avoid losing it.

## 3. Historical / Large Checkpoint Areas

Main historical checkpoint tree:

- `/home/qiaosir/projects/compute_vit/checkpoints/_gpt` — most GPT/Codex-era TinyViT/HAT experiments.
- `/home/qiaosir/projects/compute_vit/checkpoints/_gpt/postfix_m_series` — M-series standard/ensemble/proportional results.
- `/home/qiaosir/projects/compute_vit/checkpoints/_gpt/cx_k3_dgeff`, `cx_k4_alpha`, `cx_parity_minimal`, `all_linear_cadence` — CX/K-series ablations and parity work.
- `/home/qiaosir/projects/compute_vit/checkpoints/_ensemble` — V4 ensemble seed/NL reruns.
- `/home/qiaosir/projects/compute_vit/checkpoints/_gpt/data_ablation_cifar10` — CIFAR data ablation runs.

AIHWKit/R11D checkpoint tree:

- `/home/qiaosir/projects/compute_vit/paper2_aihwkit_baseline/checkpoints` — all R11D AIHWKit/PCM train/eval artifacts.
- Important valid current dirs are the six seed dirs listed in Section 2.
- Invalid or diagnostic dirs are intentionally kept for audit, but must not be used as paper-facing evidence.

Known invalid/diagnostic examples:

- `r11d_7_pcm_4bit_seed456_PARTIAL_PIPEFAIL_BUG_20260429_100717` — partial/invalid, pipefail bug.
- `r11d_5a_pcm_PCMPresetDevice_seed42` — invalid historical preset run.
- nested `paper2_aihwkit_baseline/checkpoints/paper2_aihwkit_baseline/checkpoints/...` — wrong-cwd artifacts.
- `r11d_5a_pcm_oracle_noise_free` — diagnostic only unless clean provenance rerun is performed.

## 5. GitHub / Git Status Warning

The clean GitHub branches contain code and selected Markdown docs only. They do **not** contain large checkpoint/data directories.

Current relevant clean branches:

```text
main
master
main-clean-20260429
remote-107-kv-20260429
```

Large data directories are ignored by `.gitignore`, especially:

```text
checkpoints/
logs/
outputs/
data/
```

Therefore: **GitHub is not a backup of the experiment data.** It is only a backup of code and selected reports.

## 6. Recommended Backup Command

Use an external disk or a safe internal storage path. Replace `/BACKUP_DEST` before running.

```bash
cd /home/qiaosir/projects/compute_vit
BACKUP=/BACKUP_DEST/compute_vit_data_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
mkdir -p "$BACKUP"
rsync -a --info=progress2 \
  checkpoints \
  paper2_aihwkit_baseline/checkpoints \
  outputs \
  report_md/_gpt \
  paper2/results \
  logs \
  paper2_aihwkit_baseline/logs \
  "$BACKUP"/
```

Minimum backup if disk space is limited:

```bash
cd /home/qiaosir/projects/compute_vit
BACKUP=/BACKUP_DEST/compute_vit_min_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
mkdir -p "$BACKUP"
rsync -a --info=progress2 \
  paper2_aihwkit_baseline/checkpoints/r11d_7_pcm_4bit_seed123 \
  paper2_aihwkit_baseline/checkpoints/r11d_7_pcm_4bit_seed456_clean \
  paper2_aihwkit_baseline/checkpoints/r11d_7_pcm_4bit_seed789 \
  paper2_aihwkit_baseline/checkpoints/r11d_5a_pcm_seed123 \
  paper2_aihwkit_baseline/checkpoints/r11d_5a_pcm_seed456 \
  paper2_aihwkit_baseline/checkpoints/r11d_5a_pcm_seed789 \
  outputs/R11D_FINAL_3SEED_SUMMARY_20260429.md \
  outputs/DATA_FILE_MANIFEST_20260429.txt \
  report_md/_gpt \
  "$BACKUP"/
```

## 7. How To Find A Result Quickly

Search R11D final summary:

```bash
cd /home/qiaosir/projects/compute_vit
rg "R11D_FINAL|4-bit PCM|8-bit PCM|Drift drop" outputs report_md/_gpt
```

Find one run's artifacts:

```bash
find paper2_aihwkit_baseline/checkpoints/r11d_7_pcm_4bit_seed789 -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | sort
```

Search full local manifest:

```bash
rg "r11d_7_pcm_4bit_seed789|fresh_eval|drift_eval" outputs/DATA_FILE_MANIFEST_20260429.txt
```
